name: The Links
address: 405 N Des Moines St, Webster City, IA 50595
about: Webster City Links is a historic 9-hole public golf course established in 1920, featuring a par 36 layout that totals 3,047 yards from the blue tees. The course is located alongside the Boone River and offers a fun and challenging experience with a mix of par-3s, par-4s, and par-5s, designed for golfers of all skill levels. It operates without required tee times and provides rental carts to accommodate players. The venue also features an indoor golf simulator for year-round practice and play, complemented by a full bar and a clubhouse with a 170-person capacity, making it suitable for events like weddings, class reunions, and business meetings. Memberships and leagues are available, with a special 50% discount for first-time members, and the facility accepts gift vouchers for rounds, merchandise, or dining, excluding memberships and range passes.
why_golfers_like_it: Historic 9-hole course alongside the Boone River
Indoor golf simulator for year-round practice
Full bar and event-friendly clubhouse with 170-person capacity
First-time member discounts and family-friendly memberships
No required tee times for flexible play

food_and_drink.notes: Available in the clubhouse and restaurant, with dining options for events and casual meals
Full bar available in the clubhouse

simulator_hardware.notes: Indoor golf simulator available for booking, but specific hardware brand not specified

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While the venue does not explicitly state whether rental clubs are available, it is common practice at public courses to offer club rentals. It is recommended to contact the clubhouse directly for confirmation.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full bar and restaurant, but BYOB (bring your own alcohol) policies are not specified. Gift vouchers can be used for dining, but outside food and drink may be restricted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Webster City Links is a 9-hole course, so playing 18 holes would typically require two rounds. The time per round depends on pace of play, but with no required tee times, players can start at their convenience.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly, with family memberships available and a casual atmosphere suitable for all ages. The 9-hole course is accessible to beginners, including children, and the clubhouse can host family events.
